main.name: Winter, Cynical Opportunist
main.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Whenever Winter attacks, mill three cards.
Delirium — At the beginning of your end step, you may exile any number of cards from your graveyard with four or more card types among them. If you do, put a permanent card from among them onto the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Eternal Witness
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: She remembers every word spoken, from the hero's oath to the baby's cry.

card.name: Liliana, Death's Majesty
card.oracle_text:
+1: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token. Mill two cards.
−3: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. That creature is a black Zombie in addition to its other colors and types.
−7: Destroy all non-Zombie creatures.

card.name: Rampant Growth
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Nature grows solutions to its problems.

card.name: Stinkweed Imp
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a creature, destroy that creature.
Dredge 5 (If you would draw a card, you may mill five cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Ferropede
card.oracle_text:
This creature can't be blocked.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may remove a counter from target permanent.

card.name: Millikin
card.oracle_text: {T}, Mill a card: Add {C}. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
card.flavor_text: The toymaker frowned in bewilderment. None of his creations had ever sneezed before.

card.name: Nature's Claim
card.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Its controller gains 4 life.
card.flavor_text:
"The timeless, tireless jaws of nature shall one day devour us all."
—Sildark, artificer of Omu

card.name: Grisly Salvage
card.oracle_text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. You may put a creature or land card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.
card.flavor_text: To the Golgari, anything buried is treasure.

card.name: Razaketh, the Foulblooded
card.oracle_text:
Flying, trample
Pay 2 life, Sacrifice another creature: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Liliana insisted on coming to Amonkhet to confront one of the two remaining demons to whom she is bound.

card.name: Verdant Catacombs
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Bolas's Citadel
card.oracle_text:
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may play lands and cast spells from the top of your library. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost.
{T}, Sacrifice ten nonland permanents: Each opponent loses 10 life.

card.name: Llanowar Wastes
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}. This land deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Animate Dead
card.oracle_text:
Enchant creature card in a graveyard
When this Aura enters, if it's on the battlefield, it loses "enchant creature card in a graveyard" and gains "enchant creature put onto the battlefield with this Aura." Return enchanted creature card to the battlefield under your control and attach this Aura to it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it.
Enchanted creature gets -1/-0.

card.name: Lightning Greaves
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has haste and shroud. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
Equip {0}
card.flavor_text: After lightning struck the cliffs, the ore became iron, the iron became steel, and the steel became greaves. The lightning never left.

card.name: Mesmeric Orb
card.oracle_text: Whenever a permanent becomes untapped, that permanent's controller mills a card.
card.flavor_text: A step in one direction is two steps away from another.

card.name: Exquisite Blood
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life.
card.flavor_text: Even as humans regained the upper hand, some still willingly traded their lives for a chance at immortality.

card.name: Reanimate
card.oracle_text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.
card.flavor_text:
"You'd better be worth it."
—Liliana Vess

card.name: Archetype of Endurance
card.oracle_text:
Creatures you control have hexproof.
Creatures your opponents control lose hexproof and can't have or gain hexproof.
card.flavor_text: Despite its fearsome stature, it is as elusive as a shadow, circling round to stalk those who presume to hunt it.

card.name: Dark Ritual
card.oracle_text: Add {B}{B}{B}.

card.name: Nylea, God of the Hunt
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
As long as your devotion to green is less than five, Nylea isn't a creature. (Each {G} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to green.)
Other creatures you control have trample.
{3}{G}: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Tree of Tales
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {G}.
card.flavor_text: Tel-Jilad, sanctum of the ancient trolls, keepers of the secret of Mirrodin's origin.

card.name: Undergrowth Stadium
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Soul Shatter
card.oracle_text: Each opponent sacrifices a creature or planeswalker with the greatest mana value among creatures and planeswalkers they control.
card.flavor_text: The Kargan tribes share legends of the victory their ancestors won over the Akoum Skyclave, and its horrendous cost.

card.name: Golgari Rot Farm
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
{T}: Add {B}{G}.

card.name: Grist, the Hunger Tide
card.oracle_text:
As long as Grist isn't on the battlefield, it's a 1/1 Insect creature in addition to its other types.
+1: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token, then mill a card. If an Insect card was milled this way, put a loyalty counter on Grist and repeat this process.
−2: You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, destroy target creature or planeswalker.
−5: Each opponent loses life equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Darkmoss Bridge
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
Indestructible
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
card.flavor_text: The path to power is forged in ruthlessness.

card.name: Archon of Cruelty
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, target opponent sacrifices a creature or planeswalker of their choice, discards a card, and loses 3 life. You draw a card and gain 3 life.

card.name: Perpetual Timepiece
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Mill two cards. (Put the top two cards of your library into your graveyard.)
{2}, Exile this artifact: Shuffle any number of target cards from your graveyard into your library.
card.flavor_text: Do not be so caught up in keeping track of time that you forget to make use of it.

card.name: Overgrown Tomb
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Twilight Mire
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{B/G}, {T}: Add {B}{B}, {B}{G}, or {G}{G}.
card.flavor_text: As their roots soaked in a weak tea of bogwater and decay, the trees absorbed the essence of death into their living tissue.

card.name: Power Conduit
card.oracle_text:
{T}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Choose one —
• Put a charge counter on target artifact.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
card.flavor_text: Never content, vedalken artificers continually tinker with their creations.

card.name: Chain of Smog
card.oracle_text: Target player discards two cards. That player may copy this spell and may choose a new target for that copy.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the others bicker over their little worlds and stars. I have an empire of knowledge, and it encompasses all others."
—Trazyn the Infinite

card.name: Living Death
card.oracle_text: Each player exiles all creature cards from their graveyard, then sacrifices all creatures they control, then puts all cards they exiled this way onto the battlefield.

card.name: Vault of Whispers
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {B}.
card.flavor_text: Heretic cultists came to the planet Sovereign in search of resources and precious artifacts. They found something else.

card.name: Deathcap Glade
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
card.flavor_text: Deadly mushrooms litter these woods, each waiting for an errant footstep to release its noxious spores.

card.name: Portal to Phyrexia
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, each opponent sacrifices three creatures of their choice.
At the beginning of your upkeep, put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. It's a Phyrexian in addition to its other types.
card.flavor_text: After five thousand years, the nightmare returned.

card.name: Haywire Mite
card.oracle_text:
When this creature dies, you gain 2 life.
{G}, Sacrifice this creature: Exile target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment.
card.flavor_text:
"They're easy enough to squish, but they're a pain to wash out of a workbench."
—Tergel, goblin explosioneer

card.name: Evolving Wilds
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"There's a certain beauty in destruction. Some will consider this war a masterpiece."
—Ashnod

card.set_name: Phyrexia: All Will Be One Commander
card.name: Necroblossom Snarl
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, you may reveal a Swamp or Forest card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
card.flavor_text: A hungry lair of flourishing rot.

card.set_name: Phyrexia: All Will Be One Commander

card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth

card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

card_faces.name: Invasion of Zendikar
card_faces.oracle_text:
(As a Siege enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You and others can attack it. When it's defeated, exile it, then cast it transformed.)
When this Siege enters, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card_faces.name: Awakened Skyclave
card_faces.oracle_text:
Vigilance, haste
As long as this creature is on the battlefield, it's a land in addition to its other types.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card_faces.flavor_text: Nahiri tried to bend Zendikar to Phyrexia's will. In response, the world rose against her.

card.name: Night's Whisper
card.oracle_text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life.
card.flavor_text:
"I have seen things that would reduce a weaker person to blubbering and raving. Want to hear about them?"
—Vraska

card.name: Brawn
card.oracle_text:
Trample
As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control a Forest, creatures you control have trample.
card.flavor_text:
"'I have arrived,' bellowed Brawn, and the plane shuddered."
—*Scroll of Beginnings*

card.name: Bojuka Bog
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.
card.flavor_text: There loomed against the westward stars a dark black shape: a great barrow stood there.

card.name: Tranquil Thicket
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G}.
Cycling {G} ({G}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)
card.flavor_text:
"Welcome to Caras Galadhon! Here is the city of the Galadhrim where dwell the Lord Celeborn and Galadriel, the Lady of Lórien."
—Haldir

card.name: Deadly Rollick
card.oracle_text:
If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost.
Exile target creature.
card.flavor_text: "Anyone can make their audience beg for an encore . . . I prefer mine to beg for mercy!"

card.name: Stonehoof Chieftain
card.oracle_text:
Trample, indestructible
Whenever another creature you control attacks, it gains trample and indestructible until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: The soldiers were hopelessly outmatched, having brought only swords, ballistas, fire, spellcraft, and several large cannons to the battle.

card.name: Mire Triton
card.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
When this creature enters, mill two cards and you gain 2 life. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
card.flavor_text: Caught between life and death, between land and sea, between thought and oblivion.

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"The land has its own intentions, beyond the understanding of those who live on it."
—Nissa Revane

card.name: Defense of the Heart
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if an opponent controls three or more creatures, sacrifice this enchantment, search your library for up to two creature cards, put those cards onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"And as the rose began to bloom, the curse of Redtooth Keep began, at last, to wither."
—*Curse of the Werefox*

card.name: Legolas's Quick Reflexes
card.oracle_text:
Split second (As long as this spell is on the stack, players can't cast spells or activate abilities that aren't mana abilities.)
Untap target creature. Until end of turn, it gains hexproof, reach, and "Whenever this creature becomes tapped, it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature."

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.name: Golgari Grave-Troll
card.oracle_text:
This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature card in your graveyard.
{1}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Regenerate this creature.
Dredge 6 (If you would draw a card, you may mill six cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Hornet Queen
card.oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch
When this creature enters, create four 1/1 green Insect creature tokens with flying and deathtouch.

card.name: Rogue's Passage
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
card.flavor_text: The Railroad is an organization dedicated to freeing synths from the influence of the Institute. Their HQ is a secret location found by following the Freedom Trail.

card.name: Viridescent Bog
card.flavor_text: The Master had literally built his army one mutant at a time. Humans, preferably with little radiation damage, were captured and sent to the vats.

card.name: Swiftfoot Boots
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has hexproof and haste. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control. It can attack and {T} no matter when it came under your control.)
Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
card.flavor_text: "I don't need brakes. I usually find that if something stops me, it's interesting enough to stop for."

card.name: Lumra, Bellow of the Woods
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance, reach
Lumra's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.
When Lumra enters, mill four cards. Then return all land cards from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Blooming Marsh
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Flare of Malice
card.oracle_text:
You may sacrifice a nontoken black creature rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Each opponent sacrifices a creature or planeswalker with the greatest mana value among creatures and planeswalkers they control.
card.flavor_text: "Suffer as I have suffered. Lose as I have lost."

card.name: Six
card.oracle_text:
Reach
Whenever Six attacks, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand.
During your turn, nonland permanent cards in your graveyard have retrace. (You may cast permanent cards from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying their other costs.)

card.name: Ripples of Undeath
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your first main phase, mill three cards. Then you may pay {1} and 3 life. If you do, put a card from among those cards into your hand.
card.flavor_text: As the monster lay dying, it stared into the eyes of the human who slew it. Decades later, it has yet to break its gaze.

card.name: Satyr Wayfinder
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.
card.flavor_text: The first satyr to wake after a revel must search for the site of the next one.

card.name: Assassin's Trophy
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"A merry life and a short one, as promised. How well I know myself."
—Bartholomew "Black Bart" Roberts

card.name: Enduring Tenacity
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you gain life, target opponent loses that much life.
When Enduring Tenacity dies, if it was a creature, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. It's an enchantment. (It's not a creature.)

card.name: Woodland Cemetery
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp or a Forest.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
card.flavor_text:
"They never found the body of young Josu, or that of his murderous sister."
—"The Fall of the House of Vess"

card.name: Dryad Arbor
card.oracle_text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {G}.")

card.name: Valgavoth's Lair
card.oracle_text:
Hexproof
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color.
{T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.
card.flavor_text: It is the one chamber whose location never changes, the rotten, rancorous heart of Duskmourn itself.

card.name: Valgavoth, Terror Eater
card.oracle_text:
Flying, lifelink
Ward—Sacrifice three nonland permanents.
If a card you didn't control would be put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.
During your turn, you may play cards exiled with Valgavoth. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost.

card_faces.oracle_text:
Whenever one or more cards are put into your graveyard from your library, each opponent loses 1 life for each card type among those cards.

card.oracle_text: Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: He'd chosen a sunlit clearing with open skies and an ample brook. All that remained was to find a worthy sapling.

card.name: Whip of Erebos
card.oracle_text:
Creatures you control have lifelink.
{2}{B}{B}, {T}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step. If it would leave the battlefield, exile it instead of putting it anywhere else. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Professor Onyx
card.oracle_text:
Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
+1: You lose 1 life. Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.
−3: Each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls.
−8: Each opponent may discard a card. If they don't, they lose 3 life. Repeat this process six more times.

card.name: Stitcher's Supplier
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters or dies, mill three cards. (Put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)
card.flavor_text: No part goes to waste.

card.name: Incarnation Technique
card.oracle_text:
Demonstrate (When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you do, choose an opponent to also copy it.)
Mill five cards, then return a creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
card.flavor_text:
"We could be on the verge of a four-fold cross rip. A PKE surge of incredible, even dangerous proportions."
—Dr. Raymond Stantz

card.name: Tireless Provisioner
card.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token or a Treasure token. (Food is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life." Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Blasphemous Edict

You may pay {B} rather than pay this spell's mana cost if there are thirteen or more creatures on the battlefield.

card.flavor_text:
"A demonic pact is all fun and games until the bill comes due."

card.name: Hermit Druid
card.oracle_text: {G}, {T}: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a basic land card. Put that card into your hand and all other cards revealed this way into your graveyard.

card.name: Life from the Loam

card.oracle_text:
